devices.name: R1
devices.script:
enable
configure terminal 
router bgp 3030
 bgp router-id 1.1.1.1
 no bgp default ipv4-unicast
 neighbor 192.168.30.2 remote-as 3030
 neighbor 192.168.30.2 update-source loopback 1
 neighbor 192.168.30.3 remote-as 3030
 neighbor 192.168.30.3 update-source loopback 1
 neighbor 192:168:30:2::1 remote-as 3030
 neighbor 192:168:30:2::1 update-source loopback 1
 neighbor 192:168:30:3::1 remote-as 3030
 neighbor 192:168:30:3::1 update-source loopback 1
 address-family ipv4 unicast
  neighbor 192.168.30.2 activate
  neighbor 192.168.30.3 activate
  network 30.30.30.0 mask 255.255.255.0
 address-family ipv6 unicast
  neighbor 192:168:30:2::1 activate
  neighbor 192:168:30:3::1 activate
  network 30:30:30:30::/64

  neighbor 192.168.30.3 activate
  neighbor 192.168.30.3 next-hop-self

  neighbor 192:168:30:3::1 activate
  neighbor 192:168:30:3::1 next-hop-self
  neighbor 40:40:40::2 activate
